# First seen binary (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. First seen binary.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and actor_process_image_name != null and agent_hostname != null | alter bin_lc = lowercase(actor_process_image_name) | dedup agent_hostname, bin_lc by asc _time | fields agent_hostname, bin_lc, _time | sort asc _time | limit 60
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
